rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §61.09022 governs postsecondary credential value information tools. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no overlapping operative text.
quote: Sec. 61.09022. INFORMATION TO ASSIST STUDENTS IN ASSESSING VALUE OF POSTSECONDARY CREDENTIALS.
_note: No conflict; rule text is unrelated to homestead exemption.
